name: Court Bouillon - Master Chefs
recipeIngredient: 1 Leek, white part only, trimmed and sliced (optional)
recipeInstructions:
For Court Bouillon:
===================
1. Place water, onion, carrot, celery, leek, fennel, thyme, dill, salt, and 4 peppercorns in a saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil over medium heat.
3. Once boiling, reduce the heat to maintain a simmer for 25 minutes.
4. Turn off the heat and strain the liquid through a fine-mesh sieve into a clean container.
5. Discard the solids and reserve the strained broth.
Note: The Knapp Press, Los Angeles, 1985; Written by Richard Sax; Photographs by Nancy McFarland; Chef: Seppi Renggli at The Four Seasons Restaurant, New York; Owners: Tom Margittai and Paul Kovi.
